_comment: Skill 39 agent-specialty roster TEMPLATE. The operator fills this with their real agents. Use opaque agent_ref handles (NOT names/emails/phones) so the PII-free event log stays clean. specialties: any of buyer, listing, luxury, investment, first_time, relocation, commercial. areas: free-form area labels the agent covers. capacity_weight: relative round-robin load (higher = takes more). Fair-housing: route on specialty + availability + area ONLY, never on protected class.
